purpose: A learner- and maintainer-readable archive of important Memory Mastery versions without duplicating full static builds in the live app bundle.

rebuildPolicy.recommended: Create git tags for important milestones, then rebuild or inspect a historical version with git worktree or checkout when needed.
rebuildPolicy.whyNotBundleEveryBuild: The app contains large JSON seed data. Copying full historical builds into GitHub Pages would make the repository heavy and can confuse learners with obsolete flows.

versions.label: Current detail-quality release
versions.summary: Fixes card padding, panel separation and safe cloud/device progress merging.
keyChanges: Training cards no longer put text against the edge
Signed-in progress now combines device and cloud backups

versions.label: Clean design-system release
versions.summary: Removed legacy CSS and tightened the first-time learner flow.

versions.label: Progress badge patch
versions.summary: Separated the Progress label and due-review badge after a visual spacing issue was reported.

versions.label: First-success quality release
versions.summary: Improved onboarding so learners start with a useful guided memory success before advanced tools.

versions.label: First-success redesign
versions.summary: Reorganised the product around Today, Learn, Library and Progress.
versions.compatibilityNote: This archived build includes bundled historical data. The latest-data option is experimental and should be used only when schemas are compatible.

versions.label: SmartPaper-style shell
versions.summary: Introduced the broad visual direction inspired by a softer learning-app style.
versions.compatibilityNote: This archived build includes bundled historical data. The latest-data option is experimental and should be used only when schemas are compatible.

versions.label: Today's session link patch
versions.summary: Made the Today session card actionable after it was reported as inert.

versions.label: Theme and Google sign-in release
versions.summary: Added Google sign-in, Firebase sync surface, pastel themes and layout options.

versions.label: Initial full app build
versions.summary: First complete Memory Dojo static app with curriculum, builders and guest persistence.
versions.compatibilityNote: This archived build includes bundled historical data. The latest-data option is experimental and should be used only when schemas are compatible.

versions.label: Specification upload
versions.summary: Documented the original product specification that shaped the app.
